## Scope

Describe the bounded change and affected audit domains.

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `make check` passes
- [ ] No third-party source tree, large raw dataset, or credential is committed
- [ ] Audit `ERROR` outcomes are not represented as package failures

## Protocol impact

- [ ] No rubric, schema, exclusion, or cohort semantic change
- [ ] Dedicated protocol change with `docs/protocol-changelog.md` entry
